title: Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi 1
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|title=''Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' 1}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:Classic_rotj1.jpg]] |title=''Classic Star Wars:
Return of the Jedi'' 1 |writer=[[Archie Goodwin]] |penciller=[[Al Williamson]], [[Carlos Garzón]] |inker=[[Al Williamson]], [[Carlos Garzón]] |letterer=[[Ed King]] |colorist=[[Cary S. Porter]] |cover artist=[[Adam Hughes]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[October 1]], [[1994]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/93-646/Classic-Star-Wars-Return-of-the-Jedi-1|text=Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi #1}} |other date= |media type= |pages=38 |isbn=none |timeline=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] |series=[[Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (comic series)|''Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'']] |issues=1 |preceded by= |followed by=[[Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi 2|''Return of the Jedi'' 2]] }} '''''Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' 1''' collects the first two issues of the [[Marvel Comics]]' adaptation of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Dark Horse presents ''Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'', the next thrilling chapter in the greatest space fantasy ever! The Emperor and Darth Vader make the final preparations to destroy the Rebel Alliance once and for all. Meanwhile, Luke Skywalker, now a Jedi Knight, must rescue Han Solo, frozen in carbonite, from the palace of Jabba the Hutt.'' ==Contents== *[[Return of the Jedi 1|''Return of the Jedi'' 1]] *[[Return of the Jedi 2|''Return of the Jedi'' 2]] ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi 1}} ===Cover gallery=== File:Classic_rotj1.jpg|Cover File:CSWROTJ1-FC.jpg|Full cover art ===Collected in=== *[[Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (trade paperback)|''Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' trade paperback]] *''[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi - The Special Edition]]'' *''[[Star Wars Omnibus: The Complete Saga]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Rebellion Vol. 6]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends: The Rebellion Omnibus Vol. 3]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/93-646/Classic-Star-Wars-Return-of-the-Jedi-1|text=Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi #1}} {{Interlang |es=Classic Star Wars: El Retorno del Jedi 1 |ka=კლასიკური ვარსკვლავური ომები: ჯედაის დაბრუნება 1 }} [[Category:Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi issues|01]]
